gaps_union: Notification of government or law enforcement access requests
Requirement to delete personal data no longer necessary for processing
Processor obligation to maintain records of processing activities (ROPA)
Procedure for responding to government or law enforcement access requests, including notifying Customer before disclosure unless prohibited
Vendor obligation to maintain records of processing activities (e.g., Art. 30 GDPR)
Vendor obligation to notify Customer of legally binding government or law enforcement requests for personal data disclosure
